# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: users-service
  labels:
    app: users-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: users-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: users-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: users-service
          image: your-registry/users-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: users-service
  labels:
    app: users-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: users-service
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payments-service
  labels:
    app: payments-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payments-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: payments-service
          image: your-registry/payments-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payments-service
  labels:
    app: payments-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: payments-service
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: orders-service
  labels:
    app: orders-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: orders-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: orders-service
          image: your-registry/orders-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: orders-service
  labels:
    app: orders-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: orders-service
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
